rationale: The citing paper mentions Teixeira, Wedel, and Pieters (2012) once in the related-literature section as part of a grouped citation on prior work about surprise and engagement. The citation serves as a broad background example of eye-tracking/survey-based research that the authors contrast with their own beliefs-based, revealed-preference approach. There is no specific reuse of the cited paper's method, measures, or findings in the model, identification strategy, or counterfactual analysis.
